title: theodorea latifolia
intro: Theodorea latifolia, also known as the Yellow Elder, is a small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. Theodorea latifolia has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
